svg.text: • 643. Maximum Average Subarray I — base sum-of-k template
• 1456. Maximum Vowels in Substring of Given Length
• 567. Permutation in String — char-count match between window and pattern
• 438. Find All Anagrams in a String — same as 567, return all start indices
• 239. Sliding Window Maximum — monotonic deque (separate pattern)
• 480. Sliding Window Median — sorted multiset / two heaps
• 30. Substring with Concatenation of All Words
• 3. Longest Substring Without Repeating Characters — set / map of last-seen
• 76. Minimum Window Substring — covers-pattern shortest window
• 209. Minimum Size Subarray Sum — shortest subarray with sum ≥ target
• 159 / 340. Longest Substring with At Most K Distinct — count-of-distinct constraint
• 424. Longest Repeating Character Replacement — "windowLen − maxFreq ≤ k"
Recognition: contiguous range + window-aggregate predicate ⟹ sliding-window.
